name: Han Se-Mi
title: Han Se-Mi

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Leaf Blast
basic.description: Se-Mi swings her hands and fires a forward-facing bolt of magical energy.

core.name: Refuse
core.description: Se-Mi shoves away enemies with a massive bolt of magical energy. Inflicts [Airborne] on hit.

skill.name: Sharp Spouts
skill.description: Thorny sprouts burst upward at the enemy's feet in response to Se-Mi's lowered hand. Inflicts [Airborne] on hit. Grants [HP Recovery] to the team (restores 2.25% of Han Se-Mi's Max HP per second to the entire team for 3 seconds).

skill.name: Golden Meadow
skill.description: Se-Mi spreads her hands and a circular Protection Zone is created around her. Inflicts [Airborne] on hit. Restores 250 MP to Wind team members. Allies within [Protection Zone] continuously receive [Zone Effect] (MP recovery 15–22 per 3 seconds; Shield equal to 4% of Han Se-Mi's Max HP per 3 seconds).

support.name: Divine Field
support.description: Se-Mi spreads her hands and a circular Protection Zone is created around her. Inflicts [Airborne] on hit and removes the target's Shield. Removes [Debuff Zone] in areas the skill lands. Protection Zone Duration: 15 seconds. Within [Protection Zone] the user and team receive [Fountain of Protective Mana] (MP recovery 40 per 3 seconds; Shield equal to 3% of Han Se-Mi's Max HP per 3 seconds).

qte.name: Leaf Wind
qte.description: Se-Mi jumps into the air and lands hard, knocking back nearby enemies and churning up the ground nearby. Inflicts [Airborne] on final hit. Removes [Debuff Zone] in zones this skill lands.

ultimate.name: Vines of Vitality
ultimate.description: Se-Mi raises one hand and blesses her team members with vital life energy. Inflicts [Airborne] on hit. The entire team recovers HP equal to 20% of Han Se-Mi's Max HP. Applies [Lifeline] (Damage Taken -20%, HP recovery 1% of Han Se-Mi's Max HP per second to the entire team for 15 seconds).

passive.name: Breathe
passive.description: When the user uses Sharp Sprouts, Golden Meadow, or Vines of Vitality it grants [Breathe] buff to team members (cooldown: 15 seconds). [Breathe]: Increases the user's Basic Skill damage by 10% and Wind team members' Basic Skill Damage by 5% (25 seconds, max 2 stacks).

advancements: [Sharp Breath] effect is granted to team members when they use their Ultimate Skill. [Sharp Breath]: every second grants Critical Hit Rate +1% (up to 10%), Critical Hit Damage +1% (up to 10%), and charges Power Gauge by 1% for 20 seconds.

When the user's HP is 1 or below within the Golden Meadow zone they become [Immortal] for 2 seconds. When [Immortal] ends they recover HP equal to 30% of Han Se-Mi's Max HP. This effect activates only once during battle.
Increases entire team members' Wind damage by 10%.
When the user tags out or uses Vines of Vitality it grants [Natural Unity] to team members (Attack and Defense +10%, Wind damage +20%, 25 seconds).
